content: General Electric Company is a real industrials issuer; the provider ratings shown here are illustrative, dated to demonstrate credit-rating reconciliation. Its Q3 10-Q, filed 2025-11-05, is used to illustrate meaningful deleveraging versus the prior quarter: net debt reduced and EBITDA recovered, lowering the Debt/EBITDA leverage ratio and improving interest coverage. This filing date is the as-of boundary that provider-input freshness is measured against: a provider whose rating action predates 2025-11-05 has not yet reflected the improved Q3 fundamentals. General Electric is the anchor case for the stale-input divergence.
disclaimer: Real issuer (SEC filer); the provider ratings, factors, and dates shown are illustrative for demonstration and are not actual agency ratings.
